Hacker News Confidence

Less annoying hacker news. (What is this?)

This site scrapes Hacker News once every 30 minutes, then sorts according to this formula, with upvotes as positive signals and comments as negative ones. In my experience, the best articles to read on HN are the ones with a high upvote-to-discussion ratio. Mostly because controversial pieces tend to produce a disproportionate number of comments compared to upvotes.


  1. Okmain: How to pick an OK main colour of an image 177 upvotes, 41 comments
  2. IMG_0416 (2024) 179 upvotes, 42 comments
  3. The Mrs Fractal: Mirror, Rotate, Scale (2025) 28 upvotes, 3 comments
  4. Can I run AI locally? 253 upvotes, 65 comments
  5. What we learned from a 22-Day storage bug (and how we fixed it) 34 upvotes, 5 comments
  6. The Wyden Siren Goes Off Again: We'll Be "Stunned" by NSA Under Section 702 73 upvotes, 16 comments
  7. Gvisor on Raspbian 43 upvotes, 8 comments
  8. Lost Doctor Who Episodes Found 91 upvotes, 23 comments
  9. Willingness to look stupid 659 upvotes, 226 comments
  10. Ceno, browse the web without internet access 104 upvotes, 29 comments
  11. “This is not the computer for you” 851 upvotes, 319 comments
  12. OVH forgot they donated documentation hosting to Pandas 110 upvotes, 33 comments
  13. Executing programs inside transformers with exponentially faster inference 250 upvotes, 92 comments
  14. Dijkstra's Crisis: The End of Algol and Beginning of Software Engineering (2010) [pdf] 49 upvotes, 13 comments
  15. Meta Platforms: Lobbying, dark money, and the App Store Accountability Act 998 upvotes, 435 comments
  16. Why the militaries are scrambling to create their own Starlink 16 upvotes, 2 comments
  17. Run NanoClaw in Docker Sandboxes 106 upvotes, 48 comments
  18. Bucketsquatting is (finally) dead 258 upvotes, 136 comments
  19. Show HN: What was the world listening to? Music charts, 20 countries (1940–2025) 81 upvotes, 36 comments
  20. Launch HN: Captain (YC W26) – Automated RAG for Files 24 upvotes, 7 comments
  21. TUI Studio – visual terminal UI design tool 401 upvotes, 229 comments
  22. The Bovadium Fragments: Together with The Origin of Bovadium 36 upvotes, 13 comments
  23. E2E encrypted messaging on Instagram will no longer be supported after 8 May 262 upvotes, 146 comments
  24. Revealed: Face of 75,000-year-old female Neanderthal from cave 18 upvotes, 5 comments
  25. Show HN: Channel Surfer – Watch YouTube like it’s cable TV 71 upvotes, 48 comments
  26. NASA targets Artemis II crewed moon mission for April 1 launch 41 upvotes, 25 comments
  27. ATMs didn’t kill bank teller jobs, but the iPhone did 500 upvotes, 525 comments
  28. Launch HN: Spine Swarm (YC S23) – AI agents that collaborate on a visual canvas 62 upvotes, 52 comments
  29. The Accidental Room (2018) 3 upvotes, 0 comments
  30. Removing recursion via explicit callstack simulation 4 upvotes, 1 comments

Last generated 2:00am, 14 March 2026. Source here.
